title: SkyOreGen
description: SkyOreGen is a data pack that will replace the cobblestone and basalt from generators with ores and blocks determined by the tier of generator.
body:
# SkyOreGen
This data pack will replace the cobblestone and basalt from generators with ores and blocks determined by the tier of generator.  

SkyOreGen can be used on any skyblock map as all necessary items for the data pack are given through advancements and two villagers summoned from books. 

When first loading into game the welcome text has a trigger command to allow the player to change the difficulty between hard and normal for SOG. Changing to hard will increase cost of items from Greg/Ned and will also lower the rates from the generators. Once the first piece of cobblestone enters the player's inventory the difficulty is locked and can no longer be changed by the trigger.

## Compatibility
- v1.10.0: mc1.17-1.20.2
